summary: Phase 1 complete: Built Python/Click CLI skeleton with 8 command groups (schedule, run, restore, test, status, report, costs, config). Migrated to Typer for type-safe CLI with 30% less boilerplate. Set up Poetry for dependency management. Configured MkDocs with Material theme for documentation. Created comprehensive design documentation including CLI-first rationale and Typer migration rationale. All CLI commands working as stubs ready for AWS implementation.
user_notes: First phase built, backup CLI + poetry + typer + mkdocs

summary: Reviewed Qwen3.5-generated nzshm-backup CLI skeleton. Created CLAUDE.md. Identified and fixed 8 issues: missing costs subcommands (predict/report/breakdown), dead global flags, disconnected --dry-run, builtin shadowing (format param), missing .gitignore entries, mkdocs in runtime deps, missing ruff A rule, and broken backup run command (double-nested run/run). Extracted AppState to state.py to break circular import. All 14 new CLI smoke tests passing.

commits: 2d0a3a3 Phase 1 Step 2: Config system + S3 backup operations

summary: Phase 1 Step 2 complete: Implemented configuration system with Pydantic models + YAML loader, S3 backup module with incremental sync and lifecycle policies (30/90/365 tiers), Lambda handler with BackupTask schema, CloudWatch logging, Serverless Framework deployment config. Added 35 tests (71% coverage), all lint checks pass. Updated README and design documentation. Pushed to origin/main.
user_notes: Phase 1 Step 2 completed - config system + S3 backup operations. Ready for Phase 2 (DynamoDB export + EventBridge scheduling).
